query_title: Behind the Mask: The Rise of Leslie Vernon

recommendations.title: The Horror Show
recommendations.overview: Vowing revenge on the detective who apprehended him, serial killer "Meat Cleaver" Max Jenke returns from beyond the grave to launch a whole new reign of terror.

recommendations.title: Tales from the Darkside: The Movie
recommendations.overview: A young boy tells three stories of horror to distract a witch who plans to eat him.

recommendations.title: Cruel Jaws
recommendations.overview: A tiger shark bred by the Navy as a killing machine is wreaking havoc in the sleepy tourist town of Hampton Bay.

recommendations.title: Halloween: The Curse of Michael Myers
recommendations.overview: Six years after being presumed dead in a fire, and just as the town prepares to finally celebrate Halloween again, Michael Myers returns to Haddonfield to continue his reign of terror.

recommendations.title: Cujo
recommendations.overview: A friendly St. Bernard named "Cujo" contracts rabies and conducts a reign of terror on a small American town.

recommendations.title: New Year's Evil
recommendations.overview: During a live punk-rock New Year's Eve TV programme, the presenter gets a phone call from a psycho calling himself "Evil" saying that when New Year's strikes in each US time zone, he will murder someone.

recommendations.title: The Mothman Prophecies
recommendations.overview: Reporter John Klein is plunged into a world of impossible terror when fate draws him to the sleepy West Virginia town of Point Pleasant, whose residents are being visited by a great winged shape that sows hideous nightmares and fevered visions.

recommendations.title: Attack of the Killer Donuts
recommendations.overview: A chemical accident turns ordinary donuts into blood thirsty killers. Now it's up to Johnny, Michelle, and Howard to save their sleepy town from...Killer Donuts.

recommendations.title: The Reef
recommendations.overview: A great white shark hunts the crew of a capsized sailboat along the Great Barrier Reef.

recommendations.title: Even Lambs Have Teeth
recommendations.overview: Two young women terrorized by a group of small town psychos seek revenge on their tormentors.
